---
name: frontend
description: User-invoked router for frontend and web-design skills. Type this skill name to see which frontend skill to use.
disable-model-invocation: true
---

# Frontend Router

Index of the frontend and web-design skills. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `frontend-design` | Build a distinctive web component, page, dashboard, or application. Default for any "build front-end" task. |
| `frontend-slides` | Create or convert a zero-dependency HTML presentation. |
| `web-design-reviewer` | Inspect a running website and fix design/layout/responsive/accessibility issues at the source. |
| `theme-factory` | Apply a professional color/font theme to slides, docs, or an HTML artifact. |
| `visualization` | Create or review charts, diagrams, or figures that are embedded in a frontend or doc artifact. |

These skills are model-invoked; you can type their names directly, or let the agent pick them when you describe the matching task.

If the user asks to "build a website" / "make a page" / "design a UI", use
`frontend-design` directly rather than bouncing through this router.
Use the router only when the user explicitly names `frontend` or asks
"which frontend skill?"
